name: nethereum-skills
description: Nethereum Ethereum development skills for Claude Code. Provides verified, working code examples and step-by-step guidance for common Ethereum tasks using Nethereum (.NET). Includes skills for sending ETH, querying balances, ERC-20/721/1155 tokens, events, smart contracts, signing, DevChain, Account Abstraction, MUD, DeFi, and more.
